best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-comment-001 title: adding a comment to a post module: postcomment source pages: 1,3 preconditions: user is logged in, a post exists. test data: - valid comment content: "great post!" - invalid comment content: "" test steps: 1. log in as a user. 2. navigate to the post where a comment needs to be added. 3. enter valid comment content and submit. 4. verify that the comment is added successfully. 5. enter invalid comment content and submit. 6. verify that an error message is displayed and the comment is not added. expected result: - valid comment addition should succeed. - invalid comment addition should fail and display appropriate error messages.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user creation and authentication module: user source pages: 1,2 preconditions: test data: - valid user details: name="john doe", email="johndoe@example.com", password="password123" - invalid user details: name="", email="invalidemail", password="short" test steps: 1. start the application. 2. navigate to the user creation page. 3. enter valid user details and submit. 4. verify that the user is successfully created and redirected to the home page. 5. enter invalid user details and submit. 6. verify that an error message is displayed and the user is not created. expected result: - valid user creation should succeed and redirect to the home page. - invalid user creation should fail and display appropriate error messages.
